functions.args: p_order_code text, p_customer_id uuid, p_customer_name text, p_customer_email text, p_customer_phone text, p_shipping_address jsonb, p_shipping_method text, p_payment_method text, p_discount_total_vnd integer, p_shipping_fee_vnd integer, p_tax_total_vnd integer, p_payment_fee_vnd integer, p_tax_estimates jsonb, p_fee_estimates jsonb, p_display_estimate jsonb, p_promotion_code text, p_items jsonb

policies.policyname: Public can read active book authors
Public can read active book categories
Public can read book cover assets
Public can read active edition translators
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM book_editions
  WHERE ((book_editions.id = book_edition_translators.edition_id) AND (book_editions.is_active = true))))

policies.policyname: Public can read active book editions
policies.qual:
((is_active = true) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM book_works
  WHERE ((book_works.id = book_editions.work_id) AND (book_works.is_active = true)))))

policies.policyname: Public can read active book publishers
Public can read active book translators
Public can read active work authors
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM book_works
  WHERE ((book_works.id = book_work_authors.work_id) AND (book_works.is_active = true))))

policies.policyname: Public can read active work categories
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM book_works
  WHERE ((book_works.id = book_work_categories.work_id) AND (book_works.is_active = true))))

policies.policyname: Public can read active book works
Users can read own customer addresses

constraints.definition: CHECK (bio_short IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(bio_short) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200)
CHECK (country IS NULL OR char_length(country) >= 2 AND char_length(country) <= 80)
CHECK (death_year IS NULL OR death_year >= '-4000'::integer AND death_year <= 3000)
CHECK (birth_year IS NULL OR death_year IS NULL OR death_year >= birth_year)
CHECK (birth_year IS NULL OR birth_year >= '-4000'::integer AND birth_year <= 3000)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(description) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(description ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(description ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 300 AND char_length(COALESCE(description ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(description ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 300)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(labels) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(labels ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(labels ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(labels ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(labels ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 120)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(alt_text) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(alt_text ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(alt_text ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 180 AND char_length(COALESCE(alt_text ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(alt_text ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 180)
FOREIGN KEY (edition_id) REFERENCES book_editions(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (translator_id) REFERENCES book_translators(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
CHECK (compare_at_price_vnd IS NULL OR compare_at_price_vnd >= price_vnd)
CHECK (compare_at_price_vnd IS NULL OR compare_at_price_vnd >= 0 AND compare_at_price_vnd <= 50000000)
FOREIGN KEY (cover_asset_id) REFERENCES book_cover_assets(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL

CHECK (
CASE
    WHEN dimensions IS NULL THEN true
    WHEN jsonb_typeof(dimensions) <> 'object'::text THEN false
    ELSE
    CASE
        WHEN jsonb_typeof(dimensions -> 'widthMm'::text) = 'number'::text THEN ((dimensions ->> 'widthMm'::text)::numeric) >= 1::numeric AND ((dimensions ->> 'widthMm'::text)::numeric) <= 1000::numeric
        ELSE false
    END AND
    CASE
        WHEN jsonb_typeof(dimensions -> 'heightMm'::text) = 'number'::text THEN ((dimensions ->> 'heightMm'::text)::numeric) >= 1::numeric AND ((dimensions ->> 'heightMm'::text)::numeric) <= 1000::numeric
        ELSE false
    END AND
    CASE
        WHEN NOT dimensions ? 'thicknessMm'::text OR (dimensions -> 'thicknessMm'::text) = 'null'::jsonb THEN true
        WHEN jsonb_typeof(dimensions -> 'thicknessMm'::text) = 'number'::text THEN ((dimensions ->> 'thicknessMm'::text)::numeric) >= 1::numeric AND ((dimensions ->> 'thicknessMm'::text)::numeric) <= 1000::numeric
        ELSE false
    END
END)
CHECK (page_count IS NULL OR page_count >= 1 AND page_count <= 20000)
CHECK (publication_year IS NULL OR publication_year >= 1400 AND publication_year <= 3000)
FOREIGN KEY (publisher_id) REFERENCES book_publishers(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL
CHECK (sample_excerpt_policy IS NULL OR char_length(sample_excerpt_policy) >= 1 AND char_length(sample_excerpt_policy) <= 300)
CHECK (subtitle IS NULL OR char_length(subtitle) >= 1 AND char_length(subtitle) <= 220)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(summary) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(summary ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(summary ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200 AND char_length(COALESCE(summary ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(summary ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200)

CHECK (table_of_contents IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(table_of_contents) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(table_of_contents ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(table_of_contents ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 5000 AND char_length(COALESCE(table_of_contents ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(table_of_contents ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 5000)
CHECK (weight_grams IS NULL OR weight_grams >= 1 AND weight_grams <= 50000)
FOREIGN KEY (work_id) REFERENCES book_works(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (edition_id) REFERENCES book_editions(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
CHECK (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at > starts_at)

CHECK (discount_type = 'fixed-vnd'::text AND amount_vnd IS NOT NULL AND amount_vnd >= 0 AND percentage_basis_points IS NULL OR discount_type = 'percentage'::text AND amount_vnd IS NULL AND percentage_basis_points >= 0 AND percentage_basis_points <= 10000)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(name) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(name ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(name ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(name ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(name ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 120)
CHECK (country IS NULL OR char_length(country) >= 2 AND char_length(country) <= 80)
CHECK (website IS NULL OR char_length(website) <= 500 AND website ~ '^https?://.+'::text)

CHECK (bio_short IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(bio_short) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(bio_short ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200)
FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES book_authors(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (work_id) REFERENCES book_works(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES book_categories(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (work_id) REFERENCES book_works(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
CHECK (age_rating IS NULL OR char_length(age_rating) >= 1 AND char_length(age_rating) <= 40)

CHECK (jsonb_typeof(canonical_summary) = 'object'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(canonical_summary ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(canonical_summary ->> 'vi'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200 AND char_length(COALESCE(canonical_summary ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(canonical_summary ->> 'en'::text, ''::text)) <= 1200)
CHECK (original_title IS NULL OR char_length(original_title) >= 1 AND char_length(original_title) <= 180)
CHECK (publication_era IS NULL OR char_length(publication_era) >= 1 AND char_length(publication_era) <= 80)
CHECK (cardinality(themes) <= 20 AND array_position(themes, NULL::text) IS NULL)
CHECK (line2 IS NULL OR char_length(line2) >= 1 AND char_length(line2) <= 180)
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
CHECK (ward IS NULL OR char_length(ward) >= 1 AND char_length(ward) <= 120)
FOREIGN KEY (book_edition_id) REFERENCES book_editions(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT

CHECK (book_edition_id IS NULL OR book_work_id IS NOT NULL AND char_length(COALESCE(edition_title, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(edition_title, ''::text)) <= 180 AND (edition_language = ANY (ARRAY['vi'::text, 'en'::text])) AND (edition_format = ANY (ARRAY['paperback'::text, 'hardcover'::text, 'box-set'::text, 'special-edition'::text])) AND unit_price_vnd IS NOT NULL AND unit_price_vnd >= 0 AND line_total_vnd IS NOT NULL AND line_total_vnd = (unit_price_vnd * quantity))
FOREIGN KEY (book_work_id) REFERENCES book_works(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
CHECK (subtotal >= 0 AND discount_total_vnd >= 0 AND shipping_fee_vnd >= 0 AND tax_total_vnd >= 0 AND payment_fee_vnd >= 0 AND total_vnd >= 0)
FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

CHECK (shipping_address_json IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(shipping_address_json) = 'object'::text AND (shipping_address_json ->> 'countryCode'::text) = 'VN'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'recipientName'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'recipientName'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'phone'::text, ''::text)) >= 7 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'phone'::text, ''::text)) <= 24 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'line1'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'line1'::text, ''::text)) <= 180 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'district'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'district'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'province'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(shipping_address_json ->> 'province'::text, ''::text)) <= 120)

CHECK (default_shipping_address IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(default_shipping_address) = 'object'::text AND (default_shipping_address ->> 'countryCode'::text) = 'VN'::text AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'recipientName'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'recipientName'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'phone'::text, ''::text)) >= 7 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'phone'::text, ''::text)) <= 24 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'line1'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'line1'::text, ''::text)) <= 180 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'district'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'district'::text, ''::text)) <= 120 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'province'::text, ''::text)) >= 1 AND char_length(COALESCE(default_shipping_address ->> 'province'::text, ''::text)) <= 120)
CHECK (email IS NULL OR char_length(email) >= 3 AND char_length(email) <= 254 AND email ~* '^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$'::text)
CHECK (full_name IS NULL OR char_length(full_name) >= 1 AND char_length(full_name) <= 120)
FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
CHECK (phone IS NULL OR char_length(phone) >= 7 AND char_length(phone) <= 24 AND phone ~ '^[0-9+(). -]+$'::text)
